title: spermacoce bahamensis
intro: Spermacoce bahamensis, also known as Bahamian bee-balm or Bahamian woodrose, is a flowering plant species in the family Rubiaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral effects. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, thanks to its high concentration of flavonoids and alkaloids. Spermacoce bahamensis can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a popular herbal remedy in folk medicine.
